nasb.text: Thus I was: by day the heat consumed me and the frost by night, and my sleep fled from my eyes.

esv.text: There I was: by day the heat consumed me, and the cold by night, and my sleep fled from my eyes.

cnv.text: 我白天受盡炎熱，黑夜受盡寒霜，不能入睡；我經常是這樣。

ccb.text: 我白天受尽烈日煎熬，晚上饱尝夜露寒霜，不得好睡。

csbs.text: 我常常这样：白天受尽炎热，夜间受尽寒霜，不得合眼睡觉。
